description: Use this API to delete the specified dc bus from the specified multi-terminal dc line in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_multi_term_dc_bus(dc, ibus)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the multi-terminal dc line from which a dc bus is to be removed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Number of the dc bus to be removed. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: dc bus not present in this multi-terminal dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - dc bus no longer connected to converter as first dc bus. - dc bus no longer connected to converter as second dc bus. - dc link deleted.
